title: Automatic copy for 'write updates using email'
excerpt: It’s a minor thing but it would save a lot of accumulated time - when clicking ‘write updates via email’ in a project, instead of having to click ‘copy’ - it just automatically copies it on to your clipboard. Maybe this …

posts.author: laurenfaye (Lauren Gledhill)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s a minor thing but it would save a lot of accumulated time - when clicking ‘write updates via email’ in a project, instead of having to click ‘copy’ - it just automatically copies it on to your clipboard. Maybe this could be turned on in settings or something, if it’s something that not everyone would want, but it would certainly save a lot of time over the course of a week!
